original_prompt: the assignemtn logic of pairs or single devices with device type, abstract it so that its configurable from the products section and product types
rephrased_goal: Abstract hardware assignments by allowing Product Types to define required hardware types. Update the appointment scheduling and detail views to dynamically generate drop slots based on these requirements.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.product_types.js to support hardware_requirements
subtasks_required: Add input for hardware requirements in modal
Save hardware_requirements as array of strings
tasks.analogy_reference: shape new tools for different rocks
tasks.testing_criteria: Product Type saves and displays a list of required hardware types.

subtasks_required: Check if the form correctly saves array of strings

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.appointments.js dynamic hardware slots
subtasks_required: Use selected product types and quantities to determine required slots
Generate a group of slots per product quantity instead of hardcoded pico/sim
Update drag-and-drop validation to check generic type
Update DB saving to save dynamic key-value pairs
tasks.analogy_reference: make custom holes for custom stones
tasks.testing_criteria: Drag and drop dynamically validates against required hardware types.

subtasks_required: Verify slots render correctly based on products
tasks.testing_criteria: Dynamic slots accept correct items and submit correctly.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.appointment_detail.js dynamic hardware slots

Update DB saving and display to handle dynamic structures
